    Package index

    All functions

    boot_ESS()
    Estimate bootstrapping ESS

    Get an excel file for bootstrapping results ready for downloading

    Download an excel file for bootstrapping results

    Plots for bootstrapping results
    calGamMinimun()
    Calculate the minimun value of GAM function

    Calculate the outcome of GAM function given x
    cal_minp()
    Calculate the minimun cut scores and cut point.
